summary_ja: raw-backlog-ingest batch: 5-kun toriage. take=0-kun. 4-kun wa handotai gijutsu kiji (ISSCC 2026) de AI core theme kara hazure kizoku cover-de juubun. 1-kun wa Ben Boyter no searchcode index gijutsu kiji de reference hantei.

decisions.title: Building a custom code search index in Go for searchcode.com
decisions.reason_ja: Ben Boyter no searchcode.com dokujii index architecture shosai. trigram+bloom filter (bit signatures) ni yoru code Kensaku. 200M document, 75B sen wo 128GB RAM de shori. searchcode-com.md wa MCP/API gawa wo cover shiteiru ga, kono index architecture no shosai wa mi-noroku. Kensaku engine gijutsu toshite no kachi wa aru ga, AI/LLM core topic kara no kyori wo koryo shi reference to suru.
decisions.body_excerpt: Custom Go-based code search index using trigram bloom filters inspired by BitFunnel. 200M documents, 75B lines of code, ~40ms query time. Bloom filter sharded by unique document trigrams. 1320 unique trigrams per document, 1500-bit bloom filters.
